title: Build Head-to-Head data generator (generate_h2h_data.py)
description: New data generator following generate_comparison_data.py pattern. Queries DuckDB views for batter-vs-bowler matchup data: career aggregate (analytics_ipl_batter_vs_bowler_alltime), since-2023, phase breakdown (analytics_ipl_batter_vs_bowler_phase_alltime), yearly breakdown (direct fact_ball query), over-wise split (overs 0-19), and dominance index (analytics_ipl_player_matchup_rankings_alltime). Outputs h2h_data.js with 8,552 matchups across 612 players. Min 10 balls qualification. Compact JSON output with null stripping.

florentino_gate.reason: H2H data pipeline required for new Head-to-Head page.

system_check.detail: ruff check clean. 8,552 matchups generated successfully.
